_comment: Example Storydeck instance for the synthetic demo vault. Run: STORYDECK_INSTANCE=examples/demo-instance.json python3 storydeck.py ingest examples/demo-vault

program.name: "Moonrise" maker residency
program.context_note: Moonrise is a six-week coastal maker residency incubating a handful of hardware/data projects. Coordinator: Rae. Meetings are ASR-transcribed; proper nouns may be garbled.

tracked_person.label: Rae
tracked_person.note: Rae (residency coordinator) is a special tracked dimension.
